tasks.title: Upgrade multi-perspective review to dynamic perspective selection
tasks.verification: Two cross-reviews (adversarial + protocol designer), 6 CRITICALs resolved, templates synced

tasks.title: Fix parseArgv boolean flag regression (--flag value silently dropped)
tasks.verification: parseArgv now throws when bool flag is followed by non-flag token; templates mirrored; check:all and validate:distribution pass
tasks.notes: codex finding: `--json false` leaves json=true; the next token after a bool flag should be rejected with an error if it looks like a value (does not start with --), not silently skipped. Fix in scripts/lib/sprint-utils.mjs + mirror in templates/.

tasks.title: Add sprint-board.mjs add command to create tasks via CLI without hand-editing JSON
tasks.verification: add command implemented: auto-ID (AP-NNN), validation, depends-on, regex-safe prefix; printHelp updated; templates mirrored; all gates pass
tasks.notes: Discovered while seeding this sprint: there is no way to add a task to the backlog via CLI. You must hand-edit .va-auto-pilot/sprint-state.json. This violates the CLI-first principle. Add: `node scripts/sprint-board.mjs add --title <text> --priority <P0-P3> [--source <text>] [--depends-on <ID,...>]`. Should auto-assign next AP-NNN id, set state=Backlog, write JSON, render board.

tasks.title: Add unit test suite for sprint-board.mjs pure functions
tasks.verification: 41/41 unit tests pass via node:test; check:units added to check:all; all gates pass

tasks.title: Replace hand-rolled YAML parser with yaml package in sprint-utils.mjs
tasks.verification: yaml package moved to dependencies; readSprintPathsFromConfig replaced with yaml.parse(); stripYamlValue kept as compat export; templates mirrored; all gates pass

tasks.title: Expand test-flows to cover add, update, journal, and next CLI commands
tasks.verification: sprint-board-cli.yaml added (9 flows, 18 MUST/3 SHOULD); test-cli-flows.mjs runner with isolated_state/isolated_journal; check:cli-flows added to check:all; all gates pass

tasks.title: Correct 'human-out-of-the-loop' framing to 'human-on-the-loop' across docs and website
tasks.verification: docs/human-on-the-loop.md created with updated framing; old file removed; README.md and README.zh.md references updated; all gates pass
